tool_args.content:
# Episode.json schema and evidence for P3.1

## Schema:
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "run_id": {"type": "string"},
    "input": {"type": "object"},
    "plan_snapshot": {"type": "object"},
    "tool_calls": {"type": "array"},
    "outputs": {"type": "object"},
    "violations": {"type": "array"}
  }
}

## Minimum Fields:
- run_id
- input
- plan_snapshot
- tool_calls

## Evidence:
- Audit trail kept up to date.
